creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
Unless you can capture and make available a serial
console log of the failing context, it is not clear
how to make progress for this, given that some other
other folks are not having such problems.

We need to identify what is distinct about your
context that leads to the failure that you report
compared to others not getting the problems. The
serial console log is the most likely place for
some appropriate information to show up.
